tests.name: Login Test
tests.scenario: User logs in with valid credentials
tests.steps:
1. Open login page
2. Enter email and password
3. Click Sign In
tests.expectedResult: User is redirected to the dashboard and session is created

tests.name: Invalid Login Test
tests.steps:
1. Open login page
2. Enter invalid credentials
3. Click Sign In
tests.expectedResult: Validation message is shown and login is blocked

tests.name: Add to Cart Test
tests.scenario: Product is added to cart from product details
tests.steps:
1. Open product details
2. Select size if needed
3. Click Add to Cart
tests.expectedResult: Cart counter increments and product appears in cart

tests.name: Remove Cart Item Test
tests.scenario: User removes an item from cart
tests.steps:
1. Open cart page
2. Remove a product
3. Verify updated totals
tests.expectedResult: Item is removed and totals recalculate correctly

tests.name: Checkout Form Test
tests.scenario: User completes checkout with valid data
tests.steps:
1. Open checkout page
2. Enter shipping details
3. Submit order
tests.expectedResult: Order confirmation is shown and payment flow is successful

tests.name: Coupon Validation Test
tests.scenario: User applies a valid discount code
tests.steps:
1. Open checkout page
2. Enter coupon code
3. Apply coupon
tests.expectedResult: Discount is applied and order total updates

tests.name: Password Reset Test
tests.steps:
1. Open forgot password screen
2. Enter email
3. Submit request
tests.expectedResult: Reset email is sent to the registered address

tests.name: Cart Badge Sync Test
tests.scenario: Cart badge reflects items across tabs
tests.steps:
1. Add product in one tab
2. Open cart in another tab
3. Refresh state
tests.expectedResult: Cart count stays in sync across the session

tests.name: Address Validation Test
tests.steps:
1. Open checkout page
2. Leave address fields incomplete
3. Submit form

bugs.title: Cart subtotal lags after rapid updates
Login error copy is inconsistent with design system
Checkout progress indicator overlaps on mobile
Coupon toast can stack twice on slow networks
